ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country/region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country/region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region (e.g., Asia, Africa) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country/region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country/region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country/region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country/region */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* Value-added tax (VAT) rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitor_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitor model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitor model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the monitor (e.g., All, General (G, E series)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monitor model */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of the LCD panel (e.g., IPS, TN, VA) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the monitor */,
  "size_inch" REAL /* Size of the monitor in inches */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the monitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country/region */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitor model */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the monitor */,
  "panel_warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the LCD panel */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  "panel_type_warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for different panel types */,
  "additional_components_warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for additional components (e.g., power supply, cables) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the warranty policy */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the warranty policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_policies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES monitor_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country/region */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company (if applicable) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitor model */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the purchased monitor */,
  "price" REAL /* Purchase price of the monitor */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the purchase */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  "is_warranty_extended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the warranty has been extended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES monitor_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty claim */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of the claim (e.g., repair, replacement) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim (e.g., faulty panel, power supply failure) */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service center handling the claim */,
  "service_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the service center */,
  "service_center_address" TEXT /* Address of the service center */,
  "service_center_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the service center */,
  "service_center_email" TEXT /* Email address of the service center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service, sales) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country/region */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
